sys_script_fix.description:
- v.2.5 P2
STRY0076599 - Template Task work item type was not properly updating due to UI Policy that was incorrect. Find all mismatched work_item_type fields and update them.
- one time fix for any 2.2 or greater task Version of Tasker
- to test - Query Template Task and look for all tasker_type fields that have a review item type (approved with signature, approved without signature) - Get the count of Template Tasks with review item types.
https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_route_tasks_list.do?sysparm_query=tasker_typeSTARTSWITHapproval&sysparm_first_row=1&sysparm_view= If this is zero, then you need to add an approval type Template Task to validate.
- Run a query to show the count of Task Templates who's Tasker Type starts with approval and who's work_item_type = 'review_item' THIS WILL BE ZERO, THAT IS THE PROBLEM https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_route_tasks_list.do?sysparm_query=tasker_typeSTARTSWITHapproval%5Ework_item_type%3Dreview_item&sysparm_first_row=1&sysparm_view=
Before running the Fix Script, there will only be 'work_item' values in the work_item_type field. That is the issue this fix script addresses.
After this fix, run the same queries: - The count of approval items should match the count of 'review_item' work_item_type rows. The first query above and the second query should show the same number of rows.
in addition, you can run this query to see the problems. This should show the list of items that will change. After the fix script, it should show NO rows. https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_route_tasks_list.do?sysparm_query=tasker_typeSTARTSWITHapproval%5Ework_item_type!%3Dreview_item&sysparm_first_row=1&sysparm_view=
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker2.5.13_Fix TempTask work_item_type
